Commands

Complete reference for all Kairo CLI commands.

kairo chat

Start an interactive AI chat session in your terminal.

Command
Usage
$ kairo chat [options]
Options
--providerSpecify AI provider
--modelSpecify model to use
--file, -fInclude file context
--sessionResume previous session
Examples
$ kairo chat$ kairo chat --provider anthropic$ kairo chat --file src/app.tsx

kairo models

List all available AI models from configured providers.

Command
Usage
$ kairo models [options]
Options
--providerFilter by provider
--localShow only local models
Examples
$ kairo models$ kairo models --provider openai

kairo config

View, set, or update Kairo configuration.

Command
Usage
$ kairo config [command] [key] [value]
Options
setSet a configuration value
getGet a configuration value
listList all configuration
--globalEdit global config
Examples
$ kairo config list$ kairo config set provider openai$ kairo config get model

kairo review

Review code for bugs, security issues, and improvements.

Command
Usage
$ kairo review <path> [options]
Options
--stagedReview staged git changes
--formatOutput format (json, markdown)
Examples
$ kairo review src/$ kairo review --staged

kairo explain

Explain code, errors, or concepts with AI context.

Command
Usage
$ kairo explain [query]
Examples
$ kairo explain$ kairo explain how authentication works

kairo fix

Automatically apply AI-suggested fixes to your code.

Command
Usage
$ kairo fix <path> [options]
Options
--dry-runPreview changes without applying
--interactiveReview each change before applying
Examples
$ kairo fix src/auth.ts$ kairo fix src/ --dry-run
Kairo

Your AI teammate in the terminal.
